title: tulipa oculus-solis var. maleolens
intro: Tulipa oculus-solis var. maleolens, also known as the 'Maleolens' or 'Male', is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Tulipa oculus-solis species. It is a perennial plant characterized by its unique, cup-shaped flowers with vibrant colors and delicate patterns. While there is limited information on the medicinal properties of this specific plant, some sources suggest that Tulipa oculus-solis var. maleolens may possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, potentially benefiting overall health and well-being. However, further research is needed to confirm its medicinal properties and prepare herbal remedies, which could include infusions, tinctures, and dried flower extracts.
